tech_news.title: Rayman Legends Retold announced for Nintendo Switch 2 - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Following a recent leak, Ubisoft made it official that it’s developing Rayman Legends Retold. The game is heading to Nintendo Switch 2 on October 1, 2026. Rayman Legends Retold is a remake of the 2013 game. Ubisoft has overhauled the visuals, now in 2.5D / 3D…

tech_news.title: Cyberdecks are having a moment, rejecting big tech surveillance with style and substance - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Over the last few months, these DIY hardware communities have exploded in popularity as people on social media show off their solar-powered game emulators, pocket-sized ereaders, and clamshell purse computers.

tech_news.title: Exclusive: Ex-Anduril engineer raises $42M to build the Amazon of composite parts - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Layup Parts co-founder Zack Eakin has drawn on a motorsports background, and his experience working for Palmer Luckey and Elon Musk, to tackle making faster, cheaper, and better composites.

tech_news.title: Android Is Fighting Phone Scams With a New Feature to Prove Who's Calling - WIRED
tech_news.description: Available for Android 12 and later, the anti-scam feature is baked into Google Dialer, which sends a silent “confirmation signal” to ensure whoever’s calling you is who they appear to be.
